name: morphine_build
prompt: Build a 3D structure of morphine from the SMILES `CN1CC[C@]23[C@@H]4[C@H]1CC5=C2C(=C(C=C5)O)O[C@H]3[C@H](C=C4)O` using the build-from-smiles tool. Morphine is a complex pentacyclic alkaloid with five stereocenters, so the built structure must preserve the isomeric form encoded in the SMILES. Report what you built (the molecule and its atom count). Do not fabricate coordinates; use the tool. Use charge 0.
